_comment: Plot and visualization settings. Merged on top of config_step_1.1_method.json, then config_step_1.1_runtime.json.
_plot_parameters_comment: Shared plot parameter list used across steps (STEP 1.2, STEP 2.1, STEP 2.2, STEP 2.3, STEP 1.3 diagnostics). Define it once here.
_iso_rate_efficiency_band_tolerance_pct_: Global-rate contour backgrounds keep only rows where max(eff_sim_1..4)-min(eff_sim_1..4) <= tolerance_pct/100. Step-level override key: iso_rate_efficiency_band_tolerance_pct.
_feature_space_lower_triangle_suppressed: Feature-space lower-triangle scatter matrices replace matching column blocks with a single suppressed placeholder axis. Applies across STEP 1.2, STEP 1.4, STEP 4.1, and any later step reusing the shared STEP 1.2 resolver.

step_2_1._showcase_seed_comment: Seed for random showcase point selection in STEP 2.1 plots.
step_2_1._showcase_exclude_shared_plot_parameters: If true, showcase diagnostics remove extra candidates sharing configured plot parameters. Keep false to match estimator candidate pool exactly.
step_2_1._showcase_matrix_diag_share_y_comment: Share Y-axis across diagonal panels in STEP 2.1 random_showcase_distance_matrix.
step_2_1._showcase_histogram_distance_tolerance_p: Histogram showcase candidate tolerance band around best distance.
step_2_1._showcase_histogram_min_candidates_comme: Force at least this many top histogram candidates when available.
step_2_1._showcase_histogram_top_candidates_comme: Cap for histogram showcase candidate envelope.

step_2_2._relerr_threshold_pct_comment: Maximum relative error (%) for robust color scaling in contour plots.
step_2_2._relerr_plot_limits_pct_comment: Relative-error plotting window [min, max] in percent, used in validation and error-vs-events plots.

step_3_2._show_diagnostic_center_comment: If true, STEP 3.2 overview overlays the diagnostic weighted/local-linear center. False plots only complete + discretized + synthetic outputs.

step_4_2._eff2_global_rate_eff_source_comment: Controls y-efficiency source in STEP_4_2_5 plot: auto | transformed | raw. Auto falls back to raw when transformed dictionary eff2 is largely outside [0,1].
step_4_2._eff_transform_clip_input_to_dictionary_: If true, clip empirical-efficiency inputs to the dictionary calibration domain before applying STEP 1.2 polynomial transforms (prevents extrapolation overshoot).
step_4_2._eff_transform_clip_output_to_unit_inter: If true, clip transformed efficiencies to [0,1] after polynomial transform for physical consistency.
